name: node-source-map
title: node-source-map
summary: Mozilla source map generator and consumer - Node.js module
description:
Mozilla source map generator and consumer - Node.js module
Mozilla implementation of source map generator and consumer, for source
maps written in the Asynchronous Module Definition format.
.
Source maps provide a language-agnostic way to compile back production
code to the original source code.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-source-map because Mozilla source map generator and consumer - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-source-map as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-source-map with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-source-map --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
